channel.title: Tsla on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Tsla on Archive 03

item.title: Can Tesla's '178x P/E' Be Justified?
item.description: Tesla ($TSLA) is currently priced more as a robotaxi and self-driving option than a traditional car company. We examine the conditions required to justify its high P/E ratio and the risks of potential disappointment.

item.title: Tesla ($TSLA): A Good Time to Invest? Analyzing Opportunities & Risks
item.description: Tesla’s future: An AI robotics company or a car manufacturer in crisis? Kurumi presents a grand vision of Robotaxis and Optimus, while Mikael points to declining sales and CEO risk. We conduct an in-depth diagnosis of the opportunities and weaknesses of investing in Tesla.
